title: Facial Recognition in Files
excerpt: We have a photo dump board and use hashtags to separate the files.  Having facial recognition in the files section would not only help improve our workflow with tagging people but also be able to find items such as cars,…

posts.author: imageten (Jamie)
posts.cookedHtml: We have a photo dump board and use hashtags to separate the files. Having facial recognition in the files section would not only help improve our workflow with tagging people but also be able to find items such as cars, animals, etc.
